items.title: Monitoring started: Lincoln County Registry of Deeds

page_lines: Over Two Centuries of Lincoln County Deed Registry Now Online
After eight years of work, the Lincoln County Registry of Deeds’ complete files dating back to 1761 have been scanned and made publicly searchable on the county website.
If you wish to file electronically, please contact one of our vendors:
To Notify Property Owners of New Transactions
Lincoln County is providing a free tool to help property owners protect one of their most valuable assets.
With Fraud Alert, you can sign up to receive alerts whenever a document, such as a
deed or mortgage, is recorded under your name.
Documents can be viewed online at
You can sign up now at
PLEASE NOTE THERE MAY BE OTHER PROPERTY OWNERS IN THE COUNTY THAT SHARE THE SAME NAME.
Public Real Estate Transfer Tax Lookup
Maine counties and the towns/cities within the county
Legislative, Executive and Judicial branches of government
he Registry of Deeds is located on the first floor of the Lincoln County Courthouse
at 32 High Street in Wiscasset, Maine.
